items.title: Ronaldo frustrated as Congo stun Portugal in draw
items.summary: Portugal coach Roberto Martinez brushed aside concerns, about his team and about star Cristiano Ronaldo's goal-scoring drought, after Portugal's frustrating 1-1 draw with Congo DR.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: 4 Takeaways From Ghana's Dramatic Win Over Pamana At World Cup
items.summary: A last-minute dramatic goal livened up a what appeared to be a scoreless stalemate between Ghana and Panama.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Debutant Davies lives his dream on banner day for Australia's spinners
items.summary: Joel Davies took 3 for 17 as Australia's spinners sank Bangladesh in the first T20I in Chattogram
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.
